## index

<!-- PIN: mcp-index -->

**Source**: `mcp-memory-server/index.js`  
**Tools**: 9

### remember_fact

<!-- PIN: mcp-tool-remember-fact -->

Store a fact in memory. Use scope: 

**Example:**

```javascript
// Using remember_fact
const result = await mcp.call("remember_fact", {});
```

### recall_facts

<!-- PIN: mcp-tool-recall-facts -->

Retrieve facts from memory using semantic search

**Example:**

```javascript
// Using recall_facts
const result = await mcp.call("recall_facts", {});
```

### forget_fact

<!-- PIN: mcp-tool-forget-fact -->

Remove a fact from memory

**Example:**

```javascript
// Using forget_fact
const result = await mcp.call("forget_fact", {});
```

### propose_team_rule

<!-- PIN: mcp-tool-propose-team-rule -->

Propose a new rule for team approval (requires subscription)

**Example:**

```javascript
// Using propose_team_rule
const result = await mcp.call("propose_team_rule", {});
```

### get_pending_proposals

<!-- PIN: mcp-tool-get-pending-proposals -->

Get proposals awaiting approval

**Example:**

```javascript
// Using get_pending_proposals
const result = await mcp.call("get_pending_proposals", {});
```

### vote_proposal

<!-- PIN: mcp-tool-vote-proposal -->

Vote on a proposal (requires subscription)

**Example:**

```javascript
// Using vote_proposal
const result = await mcp.call("vote_proposal", {});
```

### store_prd

<!-- PIN: mcp-tool-store-prd -->

Store project PRD/documentation for context retrieval

**Example:**

```javascript
// Using store_prd
const result = await mcp.call("store_prd", {});
```

### get_prd_context

<!-- PIN: mcp-tool-get-prd-context -->

Retrieve relevant PRD context for a task

**Example:**

```javascript
// Using get_prd_context
const result = await mcp.call("get_prd_context", {});
```

### get_memory_stats

<!-- PIN: mcp-tool-get-memory-stats -->

Get statistics about stored memories

**Example:**

```javascript
// Using get_memory_stats
const result = await mcp.call("get_memory_stats", {});
```

## figma

<!-- PIN: mcp-figma -->

**Source**: `scripts/flow-figma-mcp-server.js`  
**Tools**: 4

### wogi_figma_analyze

<!-- PIN: mcp-tool-wogi-figma-analyze -->

Analyze a Figma screen/component and match against your codebase. Returns components with match suggestions (use existing, add variant, or create new).

**Example:**

```javascript
// Using wogi_figma_analyze
const result = await mcp.call("wogi_figma_analyze", {});
```

### wogi_figma_registry

<!-- PIN: mcp-tool-wogi-figma-registry -->

Get or scan the component registry from the codebase. Shows all existing components that can be reused.

**Example:**

```javascript
// Using wogi_figma_registry
const result = await mcp.call("wogi_figma_registry", {});
```

### wogi_figma_match

<!-- PIN: mcp-tool-wogi-figma-match -->

Match a single extracted Figma component against the registry.

**Example:**

```javascript
// Using wogi_figma_match
const result = await mcp.call("wogi_figma_match", {});
```

### wogi_figma_generate

<!-- PIN: mcp-tool-wogi-figma-generate -->

Generate code prompts and imports from confirmed component decisions.

**Example:**

```javascript
// Using wogi_figma_generate
const result = await mcp.call("wogi_figma_generate", {});
```
